summary: Regression verification of SovereignAI refactor: backend pytest 6/6 PASS; frontend landing page loads with dark obsidian bg rgb(5,7,10), hero H1 'Your AI./Your Data./Your Privacy.' present, animated SVG sigil renders, resonant-field-canvas present, all 6 H2s scramble-resolve to expected strings, module-grid renders 4 blocks (vault/spire/enclave/citadel), briefing form submission returns 'TRANSMISSION SUCCESSFUL · BRIEFING QUEUED', /manifesto route renders 6 section blocks and manifesto-return-btn navigates back to /. Zero console/page errors across all flows.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactor cleanly split LandingPage.jsx (~38 lines) into landing/ section components; no behavioral regression detected.

SOVEREIGN_KEY is shipped in frontend/.env via REACT_APP_SOVEREIGN_KEY -- this is client-exposed by design (public bundle) so the header check on backend is not a real auth boundary. Consider server-side origin/CAPTCHA or per-session token in future.
Rate limiter is in-memory per-IP (5/60s) -- acceptable for MVP but will not scale horizontally; document or move to Redis when replicas > 1.
test_credentials: SOVEREIGN_KEY header: 75f635bfc726bc10747c396441fbe0ff7fdc391183a39f1076729be9705b3bd5 (from env, no user auth exists)
seed_data_creation: None. Briefing writes persisted to MongoDB via /api/v1/briefing during pytest and frontend E2E (TEST-prefixed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rate limiter is in-memory 5 req/60s per IP; if running back-to-back E2E + pytest, wait 60s between. test_briefing.py includes a 61s sleep inside test_rate_limiting so full suite ~63s. All 6 landing H2s + module blocks + briefing status all have data-testid.
